节点.功能描述: Provides methods for interacting with the continuation manager service, including methods for registering and Unregister the ability to hop, updating the device connection state, and showing the list of devices that can be selected for hopping.

Called when the user selects devices from the candidate device list. You can implement your own processing logic in this callback to initiate the hop process. selection module, returning the device ID,device type, and device name for developers to use

节点.功能描述: Updates the connection state of the device where the specified ability is successfully hopped.
